global.description: The ad features a combination of abstract graphics and text elements focused on financial tracking.
global.main_message: Track your finances with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element with an abstract shape, possibly representing a financial concept.

elements.label: Overlay graphic
elements.description: An overlay graphic that complements the central element, featuring a similar abstract design.

elements.label: Additional graphic
elements.description: An additional graphic element that enhances the visual complexity of the ad.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large background shape that provides a base for the other elements, likely in a muted color.

elements.label: Secondary graphic
elements.description: A secondary graphic element that adds depth to the overall design.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A decorative shape that adds visual interest to the ad's composition.

elements.label: Supporting graphic
elements.description: A supporting graphic element that ties together the overall theme of the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text that conveys the main message, prominently displayed in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button or text prompting user action, designed to stand out against the background.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Learn more', inviting users to engage further.

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: The headline text 'Track every euro No hidden fees' is bold and eye-catching.
elements.text_content: Track every euro No hidden fees

elements.label: Learn more text
elements.description: A smaller text button that encourages users to learn more about the service.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand logo 'EarnPath' is positioned at the top, clearly visible.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the logo is at the top, and the CTA is centrally positioned.
